parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ intent: 'ops.check_rotation_status', agent: 'system', suite_id: $env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID, office_id: $env.DEFAULT_OFFICE_ID, request_id: $('Kill Switch + Prep').item.json.requestId, correlation_id: $('Kill Switch + Prep').item.json.correlationId, payload: { check_date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10), check_type: 'rotation_failures', query_window_hours: 24 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ receipt_id: 'n8n-rotation-mon-ok-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8), suite_id: ($env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), tenant_id: 'system', office_id: ($env.DEFAULT_OFFICE_ID || $env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), receipt_type: 'n8n_ops', status: 'SUCCEEDED', correlation_id: $('Kill Switch + Prep').item.json.correlationId, actor_type: 'SYSTEM', actor_id: 'n8n-rotation-monitor', action: { action_type: 'ops.rotation_health_check', risk_tier: 'green', gateway_healthy: $json.gateway_healthy, has_rotation_failures: false, checked_at: $json.checked_at }, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ intent: 'ops.rotation_health_alert', agent: 'system', suite_id: $env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID, office_id: $env.DEFAULT_OFFICE_ID, request_id: $('Kill Switch + Prep').item.json.requestId, correlation_id: $('Kill Switch + Prep').item.json.correlationId, payload: { alert_type: 'rotation_health_degraded', gateway_healthy: $json.gateway_healthy, rotation_failure_count: $json.rotation_failure_count, rotation_failures: $json.rotation_failures, severity: 'critical', notify_channel: 'ops' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ receipt_id: 'n8n-rotation-mon-fail-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8), suite_id: ($env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), tenant_id: 'system', office_id: ($env.DEFAULT_OFFICE_ID || $env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), receipt_type: 'n8n_ops', status: 'FAILED', correlation_id: $('Kill Switch + Prep').item.json.correlationId, actor_type: 'SYSTEM', actor_id: 'n8n-rotation-monitor', action: { action_type: 'ops.rotation_health_check', risk_tier: 'green', gateway_healthy: $json.gateway_healthy, rotation_failure_count: $json.rotation_failure_count }, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ receipt_id: 'n8n-rotation-mon-killed-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8), suite_id: ($env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), tenant_id: 'system', office_id: ($env.DEFAULT_OFFICE_ID || $env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), receipt_type: 'n8n_ops', status: 'SKIPPED', correlation_id: 'n8n-rotation-monitor-killed-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) + '-' + Date.now(), actor_type: 'SYSTEM', actor_id: 'n8n-rotation-monitor', action: { action_type: 'ops.rotation_health_check', reason: $json.reason || 'kill_switch_disabled' }, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ receipt_id: 'n8n-rotation-mon-err-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8), suite_id: ($env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), tenant_id: 'system', office_id: ($env.DEFAULT_OFFICE_ID || $env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), receipt_type: 'n8n_ops', status: 'FAILED', correlation_id: 'n8n-rotation-monitor-error-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) + '-' + Date.now(), actor_type: 'SYSTEM', actor_id: 'n8n-rotation-monitor', action: { action_type: 'ops.rotation_health_check' }, result: { error_message: $json.message || 'Rotation health monitor workflow failed' }, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
